name: @dmrzl/nkrn
description: Release cleaner — sweep, burn, decay across GitHub, GitLab, registries

scripts.build:bin: bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/nkrn-linux-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/nkrn-linux-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/nkrn-macos-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/nkrn-macos-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/nkrn-windows-x64.exe
scripts.build:all: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && bun run build && bun run build:bin
